reviews.review_description: This game is fun and good, i would recommed to play this game, is has a lot cool minigames and good cosmetics, and if you have black screen just restart your headset and the black screen will go, and i really like the big sumsumg ipad

reviews.review_title: I would definitely recommend this game
reviews.review_description:
This has to be one of the best gorilla tag fan games i have ever seen
The fact that there are variable minigames to play makes this game really fun
Also the shop is cool with a variety of cosmetics (Theres not too many now but there will be in the future) AND you can actually use a shopping cart for it
Playing this with friends is so funny aswell because when they get eliminated from a game their body goes flying away
By the way owner if you see a guy named asparagus who is green and has eye springs with a green cape and nerd glasses that is me
     -Asparagus_Paragus

developer_response.body: I don't understand the issue you are having or else i would fix this. If you are willing to contact us to further explain your issue so we can fix it as soon as possible that would be help a lot.

reviews.review_description: As soon as you try playing the game, it puts you in a black screen. But if you are willing to wait 1-2 hours, then wait the time because its definitly worth the wait. 😁😁😁😁😁
man this game is terrible every time i try playing it's just a freaking black screen what's the point of playing a game that's just a black

developer_response.body: I think this is an issue with meta. There are many people playing the game and every person i have heard that have this glitch (1-2 people) have had this issue fixed once restarting their headset. I have personally never had this glitch and after the first reset the game never goes black again so i have no clue what the cause is.

reviews.review_description: just the black screen don't play this game

developer_response.body: if you restart your headset this issue is solved, I am currently working on fixed this issue although i cannot replicate the issue so it is hard to patch.
